Putu Herdy Kurniawan

Practical engineering for reliable process, facility, and control systems.

I connect process engineering, HVAC, instrumentation, BMS, pharmaceutical engineering, and energy efficiency into clear technical work: troubleshooting, documentation, coordination, and improvement follow-up.

Engineering focus

A portfolio built around practical technical execution.

Concise case studies across facility engineering, process systems, controls, and energy-related improvement.

01

Process & thermal systems

Engineering documentation, calculations, equipment coordination, and standards-based project support.

02

Facility reliability

HVAC, AHU, VRF, BMS/BAS, utilities, and field follow-up for disciplined facility operation.

03

Field instrumentation

Calibration, loop checking, troubleshooting, control valves, transmitters, and practical plant maintenance.
